name: Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, salt, and baking powder in a small bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the dates and walnuts.
3. Set aside.
4. In another bowl, beat the eggs and add the sugar. Beat well until smooth.
5. Add the salad oil and vanilla to the egg mixture and stir.
6. Gradually sift the flour-date mixture into the wet ingredients. Mix thoroughly.
7. Spread the batter evenly in a greased and floured 13x9-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25 to 30 minutes, or until slightly cool.
9. Allow the bars to cool slightly before cutting into bars.
10. Makes about 3 dozen bars.
